audioText: Man: I've been trying to reach Professor Williams all morning. Do you know if she's in? Woman: She's teaching a seminar until noon, but she has office hours from 1 to 3 PM. Man: Perfect. I'll come back after lunch then.
question: When will the man most likely return to see Professor Williams?
explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ C เพราะผู้ชายบอกว่า 'I'll come back after lunch' และ office hours คือ 1-3 PM

audioText: Woman: This traffic is unbelievable. We've been stuck here for 45 minutes. Man: I knew we should have taken the expressway. Woman: The radio said there's an accident near the city centre — it could be another hour. Man: In that case, let's take the next exit and find an alternative route.
question: What does the man suggest they do?

options.text: Wait for the traffic to clear
Listen to the radio for more updates

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ C จากประโยค 'let's take the next exit and find an alternative route'

audioText: Man: Did you get a chance to read the proposal I sent last night? Woman: I skimmed it this morning, but I haven't had time for a thorough read. The executive summary looks promising though. Man: The detailed financial projections are in the appendix. I think that's the critical part. Woman: I'll read through it properly before our 3 o'clock meeting.
question: What does the woman plan to do before the meeting?

options.text: Write a summary of the proposal
Send her comments to the man

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ B จากประโยค 'I'll read through it properly before our 3 o'clock meeting'

audioText: Good afternoon, and welcome to the Institute of International Studies. My name is Dr. Pattaraporn Srisuk, and I'll be your orientation coordinator for today. Over the next two hours, we'll cover several key areas. First, I'll introduce you to the academic structure of our programmes and the credit requirements for graduation. Then we'll take a brief tour of the main campus facilities, including the library, the language labs, and the student support centre. After that, representatives from various student clubs and societies will have a chance to introduce their organisations. We'll wrap up with a Q&A session. Please feel free to ask questions at any point — we want today to be as informative and welcoming as possible.
question: What will happen IMMEDIATELY after the campus tour?

options.text: An introduction to the credit system
Student clubs and societies will introduce themselves.
Students will be shown to their dormitories.

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ C จากการเรียงลำดับ: แนะนำโปรแกรม → ทัวร์วิทยาเขต → ชมรมนักศึกษาแนะนำตัว → Q&A

audioText: Good afternoon, and welcome to the Institute of International Studies. My name is Dr. Pattaraporn Srisuk, and I'll be your orientation coordinator for today. Over the next two hours, we'll cover several key areas. First, I'll introduce you to the academic structure of our programmes and the credit requirements for graduation. Then we'll take a brief tour of the main campus facilities, including the library, the language labs, and the student support centre. After that, representatives from various student clubs and societies will have a chance to introduce their organisations. We'll wrap up with a Q&A session. Please feel free to ask questions at any point — we want today to be as informative and welcoming as possible.
question: Which campus facility is NOT specifically mentioned in the talk?
explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ B เพราะระบุแค่ library, language labs, student support centre ไม่มีการกล่าวถึง sports complex

audioText: Thank you for calling AirMax Customer Service. I'm calling on behalf of passenger reference PNR code BK4721. Your flight from Bangkok to Singapore on the 14th has been rescheduled due to operational requirements. Your new departure time is 09:45 instead of the original 07:00. Your seat assignment and baggage allowance remain unchanged. If this change is not acceptable, you are entitled to a full refund without any cancellation fee. To confirm your acceptance of the new schedule or to request a refund, please call our hotline at 02-888-9000 or visit our website within 48 hours.
question: What are passengers asked to do within 48 hours?

options.text: Check in for the new flight online
Confirm acceptance or request a refund
Print a new boarding pass at the airport

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ B จากประโยค 'To confirm your acceptance of the new schedule or to request a refund...within 48 hours'

audioText: Woman: I heard the faculty is planning to change the thesis submission deadline. Man: Yes, it's been moved forward by two weeks. It used to be the last Friday of November, but now it's the 10th. Woman: That's going to be tight for a lot of students. Man: Apparently there were complaints that the old deadline was too close to the exam period.
question: Why was the thesis deadline changed?

options.text: To give faculty more time to grade theses
Because it clashed with the examination period
Because students requested an earlier deadline
To align with the academic calendar changes

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ B จากประโยค 'the old deadline was too close to the exam period'

audioText: Good morning. Today I'd like to present the findings from our three-month pilot programme on flexible working arrangements. Overall, the results are encouraging. Productivity, as measured by project completion rates, increased by an average of 12% across the participating teams. Employee satisfaction scores rose by 18 points on a 100-point scale. However, we did observe some challenges: teams working across different schedules reported difficulties in real-time collaboration, and some managers expressed concern about their ability to monitor team performance effectively. Based on these findings, we recommend expanding the programme to all departments while introducing clear communication protocols to address the collaboration challenges.
question: What was identified as a challenge in the flexible working pilot?

options.text: Resistance from employees to new working hours

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกคือ B จากประโยค 'teams working across different schedules reported difficulties in real-time collaboration'
